title: Is there an API for uploading user's time off and holidays?
excerpt:
I am asked to create an integration that will get the leave requests from employees in the HR system and sync them to Monday. 
I am not familiar with Monday but I have looked at the API reference and I don’t see an API t…

posts.author: renepaul (Rene Paul)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am asked to create an integration that will get the leave requests from employees in the HR system and sync them to Monday.

I am not familiar with Monday but I have looked at the API reference and I don’t see an API that let’s you upload user’s time off / holidays.

Since I have very limited knowledge of Monday terminology maybe I am overlooking something.

I would appreciate if someone can confirm this is indeed not possible or hopefully point me in the right direction if it is possible.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Possibly, what HR system?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: renepaul (Rene Paul)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Desiree, thank you for your response.

We use ADP Workforce for HR.

I found an ADP API that will provide leave per employee.

Now I need an API (or some other way) to send this data to Monday.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looks like make.com has some templates for ADP. If you’re familiar with Zapier, make.com is similar, but it’s what I normally recommend to my clients when they need integrations with monday.com

image913×595 46.8 KB

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: renepaul (Rene Paul)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Desiree,

Thanks for the help!

We have our own integration platform (Boomi) that we use to get the data out of ADP. I am looking for a way to get this data into Monday.

Usually there will be an API or some import functionality provided by the target application. I see Monday offers various API’s, also for updating users, add them to boards, etc. But it seems there is no API to add time off or holidays to users. That is specifically what I am looking for.
